Powhatan — dignified chief leitmotif
=====================================

Track:    powhatan_main.mp3
Composer: Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Source:   https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/mp3-royaltyfree/Heavy%20Heart.mp3
License:  Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0

Vibe: cedar drum + low wood flute, dignified, slow, sovereign.
This is a chief's leitmotif — NOT cartoon "Indian music."
Same gravity Conquest gives Magellan. Verified: no "war whoop"
or "savage" tags on source. Dignity bar.

NOTE: Kevin MacLeod's catalog does not contain authentic
cedar-drum + flute tracks. "Heavy Heart" is a sustained
dignified bed used as a placeholder. RECOMMENDED: replace
with a Pixabay or OpenGameArt cedar-drum + flute track
once a properly tagged CC0 source is sourced.

Required attribution (must appear in credits.html):
    "Heavy Heart" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
    Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License
